summary: Iteration 8: Comprehensive testing of 3 UI fixes - logo restoration, Google Auth button restoration, and country code dropdown enhancement. All features verified working correctly. 10/10 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed.

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 requested fixes are implemented correctly
Logo is properly displayed on both login and register pages using /logo.png
Google Auth buttons are present with correct styling and redirect to auth.emergentagent.com
Country code dropdown has 159 countries with emoji flags and search functionality
Default country is Bosnia (+387) with correct flag emoji
Phone+PIN authentication flow works correctly with admin test credentials
All UI text is in Bosnian language as required
seed_data_creation: Used existing admin user for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 requested fixes verified working: 1) Logo visible on login/register pages, 2) Google Auth buttons present and clickable, 3) Country code dropdown with 159 countries, flags, search, and default +387 (BiH). Phone+PIN login flow tested with admin credentials (+38766024148, PIN 1234). Backend auth endpoints all working correctly.
